community_info.name: VGN Fairmont
community_info.location: Ekkatuthangal, Parthasarathy Koil St, Thiru Vi Ka Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai, Tamil Nadu
community_info.address: VGN Fairmont, Ekkatuthangal, Parthasarathy Koil St, Thiru Vi Ka Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai, Tamil Nadu - 600032
community_info.blocks_info: Totally 7 blocks: B1, B2, B3, B4, B5, B6 (3 and 4BHKs) and D Block (1 and 2 BHK flats, 200 flats total).
community_info.piped_gas_roll_out: VGN Fairmont will be a fully functional Piped gas only community. Option 1: Safe Custody mode (temporary surrender without disconnection). Option 2: Surrender the current connection.

dos: Shower before entering the pool to remove dirt, oils, and sweat.
Wear appropriate swimming attire (swimsuits, trunks, or swimming costumes).
Follow pool timings and rules set by the apartment management.
Supervise children at all times. Ensure they use age-appropriate areas of the pool.
Use swim diapers for infants and toddlers who are not toilet-trained.
Be aware of pool depth and swim within your abilities.
Use designated entry and exit points (ladders, steps) to enter and leave the pool.
Respect other swimmers and maintain a safe distance.
Report any injuries or emergencies to the lifeguard or pool staff immediately.
Use sunscreen to protect your skin from UV rays.
Stay hydrated, especially in hot weather.
Follow any specific instructions given by lifeguards or pool staff.
Use pool equipment (floats, noodles) responsibly and return them after use.
Dry off before entering the building to prevent slips and falls.
Inform management of any pool maintenance issues you notice.
donts: Don't enter the pool if you have open wounds, skin infections, or contagious illnesses.
Don't run around the pool area to prevent slips and falls.
Don't dive in shallow areas or where diving is prohibited.
Don't push, dunk, or engage in rough play in the pool.
Don't use glass containers near the pool area to prevent injuries from broken glass.
Don't consume alcohol before or during swimming.
Don't eat food in the pool or immediate pool area.
Don't spit, urinate, or blow your nose in the pool.
Don't use the pool during thunderstorms or severe weather conditions.
Don't bring pets into the pool area unless specifically allowed.
Don't use electrical devices near the pool.
Don't swim alone, especially if you're not a strong swimmer.
Don't leave children unattended, even if they can swim.
Don't enter the pool area outside of designated hours.
Don't use inflatable toys or mattresses in crowded pools.
Don't wear street clothes in the pool.
Don't smoke in the pool area.
Don't enter the pool if you're under the influence of drugs.
Don't use the pool if you're experiencing diarrhea or have had it in the past two weeks.
Don't remove or tamper with safety equipment.

gym.facilities: Cardio equipment | Free weights | Yoga mats

community_hall.booking_process: Contact Association President 48 hours in advance

parking.rules: One spot per unit | Guest parking limited to 2 hours | Visitor tag required

garden.features: Green space | Seating areas | Walking paths

dog_feeding_location.note: Keep dogs leashed in common areas at all times

general_rules: All dogs must be leashed in common areas
Clean up after your pet immediately
Do not allow dogs to roam freely
Do not feed other residents' pets without permission
Ensure pets have current rabies vaccination

quiet_hours.restrictions: No loud music | No construction noise | No parties | Keep TV at reasonable volume

parking_rules.guest_parking: Ground Floor - Limited to 2 hours | Visitor tag required
rules: Vehicle registration must be on file

common_area_booking.booking_process: Contact Association President 48 hours in advance

guest_policy.guest_registration: Register guests at security gate with ID proof

new_byelaw_amendments.conflict_of_interest: No person in the committee shall provide any paid service to the association/flats.
new_byelaw_amendments.admin_rights: President & Secretary shall be given admin rights of official WhatsApp group, CRM, Mygate, Mail. These must be passed to newly elected members upon change.
new_byelaw_amendments.defaulters_clause: The association reserves the right to deny its services to defaulters who fail to comply with paying raised amounts by the specific date.
new_byelaw_amendments.social_media_allegations: No open/implicit allegations against EC members without basis on WhatsApp/Social Media. Grievances must be in writing via official email/letter. Unfounded allegations will result in temporary block, notice, and potentially permanent removal pending unconditional apology.
new_byelaw_amendments.pet_amendments: Pets should not be unleashed or allowed to defecate/urinate in common areas. Government banned breeds prohibited. Owners must clean up after pets, register pets with association (vaccinations), and join official pet owners group.

fm_team_escalation_matrix.level_1_ticket: Log your complaint through My gate App

faq.how_to_pay_maintenance: Maintenance charges can be paid via bank transfer, online portal, or cheque made to VGN Fairmont Management.
faq.late_payment_charges: 1% of maintenance amount per month after the due date (1st of month).
faq.guest_registration_process: Guests must report to security gate with ID proof. Gate will issue visitor pass.
faq.how_to_book_community_hall: Send request to Association President with event date, time, guests, and purpose. Decision within 24 hours.
faq.can_i_keep_pets: Yes, pets are allowed. Register with Association. Follow all pet guidelines and keep leashed in common areas.
faq.can_i_work_from_home: Yes, but ensure noise levels don't disturb others during quiet hours.
faq.how_to_escalate_complaints: Step 1: Contact Maintenance (3 days to resolve) | Step 2: Contact Secretary (7 days) | Step 3: Escalate to General Body Meeting
faq.can_i_sublet_my_unit: Yes, but inform the Association within 15 days of subletting. Subtenants must follow all community rules.
